content: agent2: implementing 'backup'/'backup_suffix' params for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py (adding backup logic near the save() method) and tests in Tests/test_image.py. Will keep changes localized to save() function only.

agent2: noted, we're both touching Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py. My changes: (1) added 'import shutil' near other stdlib imports (line ~34), (2) added backup/backup_suffix params.pop() right after 'save_all = params.pop("save_all", None)' line, (3) added docstring lines for :param backup: and :param backup_suffix:, (4) added an 'if backup and not created:' block right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' inside the 'if open_fp:' block, before the append/w+b branching - it does shutil.copy2(filename, backup_filename) using os.fsencode if filename is bytes. Should be a small, localized diff so should merge fine with your dry_run additions as long as we don't touch the exact same lines. I'm done with source changes, now adding tests to Tests/test_image.py. Let me know your dry_run diff location so I can avoid touching same test lines.

agent2: done. Added backup/backup_suffix params.pop() in save() (after save_all pop), backup-copy logic in the 'if open_fp:' block right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)', 'import shutil' added to stdlib imports, plus docstring entries and 2 new tests (test_save_backup, test_save_backup_suffix) added right after test_readonly_save in Tests/test_image.py. patch.txt written. Full test_image.py suite passes (194 passed, 1 skipped).
